summary: Comprehensive testing of Physical Stock Baseline feature and Rejected Row Weights fix. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification passed - Current Stock page loads correctly with inventory data, Upload Files shows Physical Stock tab, Physical vs Book shows comparison, and Approvals page shows pending items.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ inventory_baselines collection stores per-item baselines (item_key, item_name, baseline_date, gr_wt, net_wt, stamp, session_id)
✓ apply_physical_stock_updates creates/updates baselines when items are approved (server.py ~2570-2585)
✓ reverse_physical_stock_session deletes baselines for applied items (server.py ~2725)
✓ get_current_inventory in stock_service.py correctly: (1) Skips opening stock for baseline items, (2) Injects baseline values, (3) Only counts transactions AFTER baseline_date
✓ Finalize session correctly resets rejected rows: final_gr_wt=old_gr_wt, gr_delta=0 (server.py ~2664-2671)
✓ Draft sessions start with final_*=old_* and delta=0 for pending items
seed_data_creation: Test file at /tmp/physical_stock_test.xlsx with 2 items: COIN 100 -98T (6.4 kg) and A-60 PAYAL-004 (6.316 kg). Physical stock for date 2026-03-02 has 279 existing records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Physical Stock Baseline feature fully verified. Key collections: inventory_baselines (stores baselines per item). Key endpoints: POST /api/physical-stock/upload-preview, POST /api/physical-stock/apply-updates (creates baselines), POST /api/physical-stock/finalize-session, POST /api/physical-stock/update-history/{id}/reverse (removes baselines). Test date used: 2026-03-02, 2099-01-15 (isolated test data). Rejected row weight fix also verified - finalized sessions have correct final_gr_wt=old_gr_wt for rejected items.

baseline_creation_on_approve.description: When items are approved in apply-updates, inventory_baselines collection is updated with item_key, baseline_date, gr_wt, net_wt

current_stock_uses_baseline.description: get_current_inventory() correctly uses baseline values + post-baseline transactions instead of opening stock for baseline items
current_stock_uses_baseline.test_result: COIN 100 -98T: Before=5522g (book), After approve=6400g (baseline), After reverse=5522g (book)

transactions_on_baseline_date_excluded.description: Transactions on or before baseline_date are not counted for baseline items (server.py line 302-303)

non_baseline_items_normal_calculation.description: Items without baselines retain normal book calculation (opening stock + all transactions)

reverse_removes_baseline.description: Reversing a session deletes the inventory_baselines for applied items, causing Current Stock to revert to book calculation

rejected_rows_have_old_weights.description: Finalized sessions have rejected rows with final_gr_wt=old_gr_wt and gr_delta=0

draft_items_start_with_old_weights.description: Draft pending items have final_*=old_* and delta=0 (not proposed values)

steps: 1. Get current stock BEFORE - shows book calculation (5522g)
2. Upload physical stock file with new values (6400g)
4. Get current stock AFTER - shows baseline value (6400g)
7. Get current stock AFTER reverse - reverts to book (5522g)
